annotations.label: Bessel potential space H^{s,p}

anchor.snippet: are called Bessel potential spaces

annotations.note: TemperedDistribution.MemSobolev is exactly the Bessel potential space: u lies in H^{s,p} iff the Fourier multiplier (1+‖ξ‖²)^{s/2} applied to u is representable by an L^p function.
